meta.title: SourceBox Sentry Logo Concepts — design presentation
meta.usage_context: design-review presentation showing three distinct logo-mark candidates side-by-side on a dark backdrop, like a brand designer's first-round options sheet

subject.name: Three logo mark candidates rendered as crisp flat vector-style icons

physical_properties.format: presentation slide / brand-board mock — three rounded-rectangle cards arranged horizontally on a dark backdrop, each containing one logo concept centered, with a small caption label below each.

concepts.label: A · Shield + Lens
concepts.description: A classic shield silhouette (rounded shoulders, gentle pointed bottom) drawn as a 2-3px line stroke. Inside the shield, a camera-lens iris: a single concentric circle ring centered slightly above middle, with a smaller solid filled circle dot at its center. The shield outline and lens ring use a single linear gradient stroke from green (#22c55e) at top-left to purple (#a855f7) at bottom-right. The center pupil dot is solid green (#22c55e). NO other detail. Crisp, geometric, premium. This concept communicates 'guarded + watching'.

concepts.label: B · Aperture
concepts.description: A pure camera-aperture / iris mark — six geometric blades arranged in a circle forming a stylized aperture, with a small empty hexagonal opening at center. Each blade drawn as a clean angular shape with green (#22c55e) outline and a subtle purple (#a855f7) inner shade — flat shading, no gradients on the blades themselves. Single accent: a small solid green dot floating in the center opening. No shield, no other ornament. Very distinctive, very 'camera'. This concept communicates 'pure lens / focus'.

concepts.label: C · Viewfinder Frame
concepts.description: Four L-shaped corner brackets arranged at the corners of an imagined square frame, like an AI / object-detection viewfinder overlay. Each bracket has equal-length arms (rounded ends) drawn in green (#22c55e) with a 2-3px stroke. Inside the frame, a single solid green (#22c55e) dot in the dead center. The brackets DO NOT touch — there's clear negative space between them. A subtle purple (#a855f7) accent dot sits in one corner bracket joint. This concept communicates 'active surveillance / locked focus'.

layout_notes.background: Dark near-black canvas (#0a0a0f) with a very subtle grid pattern overlay (rgba(255,255,255,0.04)).
layout_notes.card_styling: Three equal-sized rounded-corner cards (~14px radius) in a row, each ~33% of canvas width with consistent gaps between. Each card has a subtle dark fill (#161620) with 1px tinted border (rgba(255,255,255,0.10)), and contains the logo concept centered with generous whitespace around it (the logo should take up ~50-60% of the card's area, not fill edge-to-edge). Below each logo, a small monospace caption (e.g. 'A · Shield + Lens') in muted off-white, separated from the logo by a thin divider line.
layout_notes.title: A bold sans-serif header at the top of the canvas reading 'SourceBox Sentry — Logo Concepts' in white, with a smaller sublabel below in green reading 'first-round directions, vector-ready.'
layout_notes.consistent_logo_size: All three logo marks should appear at the SAME visual size in their respective cards so they can be compared fairly — roughly 200x200px in the card. Stroke weights should also be consistent across all three (~2-3px).

atmosphere.mood: design studio, premium brand presentation, product designer's first-round mocks

forbidden_changes: do_not_render_the_word_'SourceBox' or 'Sentry' as part of the logos themselves — these are MARKS only, not lockups

controls.leave_negative_space: around each logo within its card — the logos should breathe
controls.notes: Render as a flat brand-presentation graphic. Each of the three cards should contain ONE logo concept rendered as a crisp flat vector-style icon. Aspect ratio 16:9. Premium dark-theme design-studio aesthetic. The viewer should be able to compare the three concepts at a glance and pick a favorite.
